reviews.comment:
El despacho de combustible tiene buen servicio.
El servicio de comida está mal atendido según la experiencia que tuve.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station has good service.
The food service is poor, based on my experience.

reviews.comment:
Había un solo playero ya que estaban con casos de covid. La atención fue igual muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
There was only one beach attendant because they were dealing with COVID cases. The service was still very good.

reviews.comment:
Tiene buena atención , siempre sujeto a espera por gran demanda en dársenas.

(Translated by Google)
It has good service, although there is always a wait due to high demand at the docks.

reviews.comment:
Bien atendido , te hacen sentir cómodo y respetado , hay que hacer cola , pero es la mas elegida de Miramar , y mi estación de servicio elegida , cada vez que vengo

(Translated by Google)
Well attended, they make you feel comfortable and respected, you have to wait in line, but it is the most chosen in Miramar, and my chosen service station, every time I come

reviews.comment:
1 solo playero para una fila de 4 cuadras!! Pobre hombre!!

(Translated by Google)
Only one beachgoer for a line four blocks long!! Poor man!!

reviews.comment:
Atención de terror dos cuadras de cola una sola persona en surtidores , realmente no sé porque no los automatizan para autodespacho

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, two blocks of lines, only one person at the pumps. I really don't know why they don't automate them for self-service.

reviews.comment:
Pongan empleados no sean ratas, un solo chico ahí atendiendo pobre son una vergüenza. uno no puede hacer una cola de 2 horas o más para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Hire staff, don't be cheapskates. There's only one guy working there, it's a disgrace. You can't wait in line for two hours or more to get fuel.
